description_long: This object is a dark blue, wing-shaped unmanned combat aerial vehicle (UCAV) with a sleek, angular design reminiscent of a stealth bomber. The body is flat and wide, with sharply angled wings and a central fuselage that houses a cockpit or sensor bay, visible as a dark, glassy panel. The surface features a digital camouflage pattern and prominent white insignia on each wing. There are two small landing wheels visible beneath the central body, suggesting it is designed for takeoff and landing on runways. The overall construction appears to be metallic, with a matte finish and minimal protrusions for stealth. No visible weapon mounts or external armaments are present, and the vehicle's design prioritizes aerodynamic efficiency and low observability.
description: A dark blue, wing-shaped unmanned combat aerial vehicle with digital camouflage, white insignia, and a sleek, angular, stealthy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, angular wings and central fuselage with insignia on each wing.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the cockpit/sensor bay and one of the landing wheels beneath the body.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the symmetry of the wings, the central landing gear, and the flat, streamlined body.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other landing wheel and the cockpit/sensor bay from a different perspective.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: digital camouflage pattern in dark blue shades
